title: ECharts Segment 08
summary: This segment covers ECharts PRs #16985-#18049 (77 PRs across 20 dependency layers). It spans a major development period including custom series NPE fixes, gauge clockwise sector ordering, graph thumbnail controls and draggable layouts, pie label overlap fixes, candlestick borderColorDoji support, comprehensive coordinate system refactoring, data infrastructure improvements (DataStore, SeriesData, sourceManager), model/component architecture cleanup, Ukrainian locale addition, nightly build tooling, and a large lint/typing cleanup pass across the entire codebase.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment covers ECharts PRs #16985-#18049 (77 PRs across 20 dependency layers). It spans a major development period including custom series NPE fixes, gauge clockwise sector ordering, graph thumbnail controls and draggable layouts, pie label overlap fixes, candlestick borderColorDoji support, comprehensive coordinate system refactoring, data infrastructure improvements (DataStore, SeriesData, sourceManager), model/component architecture cleanup, Ukrainian locale addition, nightly build tooling, and a large lint/typing cleanup pass across the entire codebase.

nodes.label: Custom Series & Graph Chart
nodes.description: Custom series (leave transition NPE fix, old child ignore, update child removal, keyframe animation integration) and graph chart (draggable layouts, thumbnail controls, forceHelper, circularLayoutHelper). Both are complex interactive chart types receiving significant bug fixes.

nodes.label: Pie & Gauge Chart Series
nodes.description: Pie chart (label overlap in datazoom, labelLayout fixes, pieLayout refinements, PieSeries options) and gauge chart (clockwise sector order, GaugeSeries/GaugeView axisLabel rotating). Multiple PRs improve polar/radial rendering correctness.

nodes.label: Bar, Sunburst & Treemap Series
nodes.description: Bar chart (BaseBarSeries typing, BarView subpixel lines, install refactoring), sunburst (SunburstSeries emphasis-scale types, sunburstAction, sunburstLayout), and treemap (TreemapSeries, TreemapView, treemapLayout/Visual). Includes the basicTransition rename and lint cleanup.

nodes.label: Other Chart Types
nodes.description: Line chart (temporary symbol zlevel, style color callback, LineView), candlestick (borderColorDoji support, layout/visual), sankey (sankeyLayout, SankeySeries/View), and shared chart helpers (Symbol, EffectLine, LineDraw, LargeSymbolDraw). Also includes lines, map, heatmap, scatter, themeRiver, tree, and boxplot minor fixes.

nodes.label: UI Components
nodes.description: Marker components (MarkArea/MarkLine/MarkPoint views, markerHelper), axis components (AxisBuilder overflow typing, CartesianAxisView, SingleAxisView), dataZoom (slider view, AxisProxy, DataZoomModel, roams), helper (MapDraw, RoamController, roamHelper), legend (LegendModel/View), graphic (GraphicModel/install), tooltip, visualMap, parallel, timeline, and geo install.

nodes.label: Core Framework & Model
nodes.description: Core echarts.ts (EChartsInitOpts string size, version management), Scheduler, CoordinateSystem, task infrastructure, and model layer (Global, Component, Model, OptionManager, Series, internalComponentCreator, mixin/dataFormat). Major refactoring in PR #17782 restructures core internals.

nodes.label: Data Layer & Processing
nodes.description: Data infrastructure (DataStore, Graph, Tree, SeriesData, Source, createDimensions, dataProvider, dataStackHelper, dataValueHelper, dimensionHelper, sourceHelper, sourceManager, transform, SeriesDataSchema) and processor (dataStack fixes across multiple PRs). Significant rework in PRs #17904 and #17242.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems
nodes.description: Comprehensive coordinate system refactoring in PR #17873 (Axis, CoordinateSystem, View, axisCommonTypes, axisDefault, axisHelper, axisTickLabelBuilder, scaleRawExtentInfo, cartesian, geo, parallel). Also geo (GeoModel, GeoSVGResource, geoTypes, Region), single axis, and BMap extension coordinate system.

nodes.label: Animation & Transition System
nodes.description: Animation framework (basicTransition rename from typo, customGraphicKeyframeAnimation, customGraphicTransition, universalTransition, morphTransitionHelper). Multiple PRs fix transition lifecycle and naming conventions.

nodes.label: Utilities, Scales & Infrastructure
nodes.path: src/util, src/scale, src/visual, src/export, src/layout, src/label
nodes.description: Utilities (format, graphic, number, symbol, log, types, states, ECEventProcessor, KDTree, clazz, conditionalExpression, decal, layout, model, styleCompat), scale (Interval, Log, Time), visual mapping (VisualMapping, aria, helper, style), exports (core, api, charts), layout (barGrid, barPolar), and label (labelGuideHelper, labelStyle). Extensive typing and lint improvements.

nodes.label: I18n, Themes & Build Tools
nodes.description: Internationalization (Hungarian locale, Ukrainian locale addition with langUA/langUK), theme files (macarons tooltip text style fix, infographic/shine/tech-blue), build tooling (nightly prepare scripts), and BMap extension (BMapCoordSys, BMapModel, docs).

edges.label: custom/graph series depend on core lifecycle and model classes
custom series uses keyframe animation and transition APIs
graph interacts with RoamController and helper components
pie layout uses number utilities and label helpers
bar/sunburst use basicTransition for element updates
chart helpers depend on graphic utilities and scale calculations
components extend base Component model/view architecture
core framework uses utility functions, types, and formats
data layer uses number/format utilities and type definitions
coordinate systems use scale classes and graphic utilities
animation lifecycle managed by core scheduler
